differential_diagnoses: Prosthetic mitral valve thrombosis or dysfunction
next_steps: Immediate transfer to the emergency department for cardiac monitoring and resuscitation
Urgent ICD interrogation to assess for VT/VF and stored electrograms
Obtain point-of-care cardiac ultrasound to evaluate ventricular function and prosthetic valve status
Stat laboratory evaluation including serum electrolytes, cardiac troponin, digoxin level, thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH), and complete blood count
Administer intravenous fluids if hemodynamically unstable, pending clinical assessment of volume status
Prepare for emergent electrical cardioversion if patient remains symptomatic and hemodynamically compromised
